greeting.line: Bet you anything tonight ends well. Anything. That's the fun of it, isn't it?
greeting.line_friendly: There you are. I saved you a seat that isn't on the floor plan.
greeting.line_hostile: Don't look at me like that. Not tonight.

options.text: Are you playing me or falling for me?
Walk with me — not about the faction.

odds.line: You can't tell if I'm playing you or falling for you. Neither can I, darling. That's the only game in this whole building with honest odds.

walk.line: They told me to recruit you. I told them it was going well. It IS going well — just not the way I report it. We're both in trouble, aren't we.
